title: CreationAct
description: Genesis 1 creation week: God brings things into existence. `creates` lists the cosmic entities individuated as such (heavens, earth, seas, luminaries, mankind) — a place becomes `created`, a person (mankind) becomes alive. `kinds` lists categories of created life NOT tracked as individual entities (light, vegetation, birds, land_animals…); like an Occurrence tag it has no reducer effect. `day` (1-6) is the ordinal day of the week. At least one of `creates`/`kinds` is required.
